descriptionHtml:
Bali Catsmart 2025 Model | Tax Not Paid | 3 Cabins, 2 Heads | Excellent Condition

VERY LITTLE USE - LIKE NEW 

(19% OFF MARKET PRICE)

Ready for effortless coastal adventures or extended passages, this Bali Catsmart delivers comfort, practical space, and easy handling all in a modern package. Maintained in superb condition and featuring a thoughtful blend of upgrades, it’s perfect for families, couples, or anyone wanting hassle-free cruising.

(Inverter, Autopilot, Radar, Code 0, Battery Charger, Fresh Water Maker...) 

Key Specifications

  • Year: Build 2024 / 2025 Model
  • Length Overall: 11.78 m
  • Beam: 6.46 m
  • Draft: 1.1 m
  • Engines: Twin 30 hp Nanni
  • Accommodation: 3 comfortable cabins
  • Heads: 2 electric toilets

Sailing & Deck Gear

  • Full-batten mainsail & reinforced Dacron Solent (with UV protection)
  • Lazy bag and lazy jack system
  • Code 0 (53 m²) with anti-rotation furling
  • Fixed bowsprit & stays
  • User-friendly furlers & deck equipment

Electronics & Navigation

  • Comprehensive Raymarine package
  • P70S autopilot, 7” Axiom GPS plotter (starboard helm)
  • Ray63 VHF (chart table)
  • External GPS plotter & radar
  • Integrated autopilot and instruments

Power & Comfort

  • 1600W inverter (12V → 220V)
  • 70A battery charger
  • Extra service batteries (total four: two standard + two at 130 Ah)
  • Courtesy cockpit/saloon lighting & optional ventilation

Deck Features

  • Flybridge with seating and bimini
  • Tender & lifting system
  • Foredeck and cockpit sun cushions (removable)
  • Sliding saloon side windows
  • Teak steps to bathing platform
  • Folding gas-strut supported saloon doors
  • Forward cockpit table, stern protection

Safety & Maintenance

  • Safety gear for 8 as per French regs (EPIRB excluded)
  • Epoxy primer base and two coats antifouling
  • Integrated life raft, first aid kit, lifejackets, torch & fixings

Upgrades & Extras

  • Sunbrella Heritage Moss upholstery, modular cushions
  • Pot retainer, bottle holder (saloon table)
  • Additional fuel & water tanks
  • Enhanced engine package
  • Numerous accessories for easy cruising

Intelligent Interior

  • Bright saloon with convertible dining
  • Practical galley with direct deck access
  • Storage throughout, airy cabins

Designed for Autonomous Cruising

  • High freshwater storage
  • Watermaker/desalination system
  • Upgraded battery bank and power inverter
  • All systems optimised for independent stays at anchor

Summary:
This Bali CATSMART For Sale 2025 stands out for smart systems, spacious comfort, and ease of use—even for a small crew. Ideal for private ownership or charter, with extras and upgrades ensuring you enjoy flexible and autonomous sailing.

Contact us today to arrange a viewing or request more information.
